case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. vs. BROWN, GLENDA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. SERVED JUL-30-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GLENDA
